mapper.select: select li.id, li.type, li.name from room_label as rl left join label_info as li on rl.label_id = li.id and li.is_deleted = 0 where rl.room_id = #{id} and rl.is_deleted = 0
select li.id, li.type, li.name from apartment_label as al left join label_info as li on al.label_id = li.id and li.is_deleted = 0 where al.apartment_id = #{id} and al.is_deleted = 0
